ds3234_begin.tooltip: Initialize DS3234 real-time clock (SPI), specify chip select pin, using global rtc object

ds3234_auto_time.tooltip: Set DS3234 clock to compile time

ds3234_set_time.message0: DS3234 Set Time Sec %1 Min %2 Hour %3 Weekday %4 Date %5 Month %6 Year %7
ds3234_set_time.tooltip: Manually set DS3234 time and date

ds3234_update.tooltip: Read all time registers from DS3234 and update cache

ds3234_get_time.tooltip: Get specified time value from DS3234 cache (must call update first)

ds3234_get_temperature.tooltip: Read temperature value from DS3234 built-in temperature sensor
